name: knowledge-vault-os
description: Install a local-first Markdown knowledge operating system for Codex: initialize a vault, capture local evidence, compile stable knowledge, view a lightweight dashboard, and call the vault during real work.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first knowledge vault workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Knowledge Vault OS helps Codex initialize and operate a Markdown-first personal knowledge base. It routes external sources through evidence packets, captures local file changes, compiles stable conclusions into topic pages, builds a lightweight local dashboard, and teaches Codex how to read the vault before acting.
defaultPrompt: Initialize a local Markdown knowledge vault for Codex
Run a daily capture over my local work folders
Ingest these files into my knowledge vault as evidence packets
Compile stable conclusions from my inbox into project and method pages
Build a lightweight dashboard for my local vault
Use my knowledge vault as context for this task
